components.product_name: Smuckers Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Chocolate Flavored Spread Sandwiches, 10 Count, 2 oz Each (Frozen)

canonical.composition_signature: smuckers uncrustables peanut butter & chocolate flavored spread sandwiches, 10 count, 2 oz each (frozen):24

channel_sku.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Chocolate Flavored Spread Sandwiches, 2 oz Each, Frozen, 24 Count
bullets: Pack of 24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches, each 2 oz, filled with creamy peanut butter and a smooth chocolate flavored spread — no prep required, thaw and eat.
Crustless soft bread baked fresh in the USA, with no artificial preservatives, no high fructose corn syrup, and no artificial colors or dyes.
Flexible storage: keep sandwiches in the freezer for longer shelf life, or move them to the refrigerator to thaw — bread stays soft in the fridge for up to five days.
Each sandwich is individually wrapped, making them convenient to pack for lunches, snacks, or on-the-go eating.
Contains wheat and peanuts. See product packaging for complete ingredient and allergen information.
channel_sku.description:
Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Chocolate Flavored Spread Sandwiches bring together creamy peanut butter and a smooth chocolate flavored spread in a crustless, soft sandwich that requires no prep. This listing includes 24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches, each weighing 2 oz.

The bread is baked fresh in the USA and contains no artificial preservatives. Each sandwich is made without high fructose corn syrup and without artificial colors or dyes.

Storage is straightforward: sandwiches can be kept in the freezer for extended storage, or transferred to the refrigerator to thaw. Once refrigerated, the bread stays soft for up to five days, so sandwiches are ready to eat when needed.

Individual wrapping keeps each sandwich separate and portable, suitable for packed lunches, after-school snacks, or quick meals on the go.

Contains wheat and peanuts. See product packaging for complete ingredient and allergen details.

ingredients.value: Bread: Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Sugar, Yeast, Soybean Oil, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Salt, Dough Conditioner (Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Sugar, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Molasses, Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Mono And Diglycerides, Salt. Chocolate Flavored Spread: Corn Syrup, Sugar, Water, Cocoa Processed With Alkali, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative), Calcium Chloride, Artificial Flavor.

components.product_name: Smucker's Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter & Honey Spread Sandwich - 20oz/10ct

canonical.composition_signature: smucker's uncrustables frozen peanut butter & honey spread sandwich - 20oz/10ct:24

channel_sku.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Honey Spread Frozen Sandwiches, 2 oz Each, 24 Count
bullets: Pack of 24 individually wrapped frozen peanut butter and honey spread sandwiches, each 2 oz — thaw and eat with no preparation required.
Soft wheat bread filled with creamy peanut butter and smooth honey spread, with no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.
Bread baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives — sealed edge-to-edge to remove crust while keeping the filling contained.
Store in the freezer for extended storage, or refrigerate for up to five days — the bread stays soft when chilled.
Individually wrapped format suits school lunches, work breaks, travel, or any situation where a portable, no-preparation sandwich is needed.
channel_sku.description:
This pack contains 24 individually wrapped Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Honey Spread frozen sandwiches, each weighing 2 oz.

Each sandwich is made with soft wheat bread baked fresh in the USA, filled with creamy peanut butter and smooth honey spread. The bread contains no artificial preservatives. The filling contains no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Storage is flexible. Keep sandwiches in the freezer for longer-term storage, or transfer to the refrigerator — the bread remains soft for up to five days when refrigerated. No preparation is required; thaw and eat.

The individually wrapped format makes these sandwiches straightforward to pack for school lunches, work, travel, or any situation where a portable, no-preparation sandwich is useful.

channel_sku.title: Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter Sandwiches Variety Pack, 24 Count - Honey Spread & Strawberry Jam
bullets: 24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches in one pack: 12 Peanut Butter & Honey Spread and 12 Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam, offering two flavors in a single order.
Each sandwich uses soft wheat bread filled with creamy peanut butter and either smooth honey spread or strawberry jam - no crust, no artificial preservatives.
Store in the freezer for extended shelf life or refrigerate; bread stays soft in the fridge for up to five days after thawing.
Individually wrapped for easy portioning and packing - no preparation required, just thaw and eat.
Made with no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes. Bread baked fresh in the USA.
channel_sku.description:
Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter Sandwiches come in this 24-count variety pack with two flavors: 12 Peanut Butter & Honey Spread and 12 Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam. Each sandwich is individually wrapped and frozen, ready to thaw and eat with no preparation needed.

The bread is soft wheat with no crust - baked fresh in the USA and free of artificial preservatives. Fillings include creamy peanut butter paired with either smooth honey spread or strawberry jam. No high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, no artificial colors or dyes.

Keep sandwiches in the freezer for extended storage. To enjoy, thaw at room temperature for 30 to 60 minutes, or refrigerate overnight. Once thawed, bread stays soft in the fridge for up to five days. Each sandwich is individually wrapped, making it straightforward to pack for school, work, or any outing.

channel_sku.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter Sandwiches Variety Pack, Raspberry Spread and Morning Protein Mixed Berry Spread, 2 oz Each, 24 Count, Frozen
bullets: Pack contains 24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread (2 oz each) and 12 Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread (2 oz each)
Each Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwich is made with soft crustless bread, creamy peanut butter, and sweet seedless raspberry spread — seedless filling, no crust
Each Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread sandwich pairs creamy peanut butter with mixed berry spread on soft, crustless bread baked with no artificial preservatives
Store in the freezer for longer-term storage; move to the refrigerator to thaw — bread stays soft for up to five days when refrigerated
Fillings contain no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes; bread baked fresh in the USA
channel_sku.description:
This 24-count variety pack includes two Uncrustables flavors: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwiches and 12 Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread sandwiches, 2 oz each.

Both varieties feature soft, crustless bread sealed around creamy peanut butter. The Raspberry Spread variety adds sweet, seedless raspberry spread. The Morning Protein variety pairs the same peanut butter with mixed berry spread.

Each sandwich is individually wrapped. Store in the freezer for longer shelf life or transfer to the refrigerator to thaw — bread stays soft for up to five days when refrigerated. No preparation required beyond thawing.

Bread is baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives. Fillings contain no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Fillings contain no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes; bread baked fresh in the USA

product_description.value:
This 24-count variety pack includes two Uncrustables flavors: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwiches and 12 Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread sandwiches, 2 oz each.

Both varieties feature soft, crustless bread sealed around creamy peanut butter. The Raspberry Spread variety adds sweet, seedless raspberry spread. The Morning Protein variety pairs the same peanut butter with mixed berry spread.

Each sandwich is individually wrapped. Store in the freezer for longer shelf life or transfer to the refrigerator to thaw — bread stays soft for up to five days when refrigerated. No preparation required beyond thawing.

Bread is baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives. Fillings contain no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

channel_sku.description:
This pack contains 24 individually wrapped Uncrustables frozen sandwiches in two flavors: 12 Chocolate Flavored Hazelnut Spread and 12 Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam.

Each Chocolate Flavored Hazelnut Spread sandwich is made with smooth, sweet, creamy chocolate flavored hazelnut spread sealed in soft, crustless bread baked with no artificial preservatives. Each Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam sandwich features peanut butter and strawberry jam in the same soft, crustless format.

Bread is baked fresh in the USA. No high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Store in the freezer for longer shelf life. To thaw, move to the refrigerator - bread stays soft for up to five days in the fridge. No preparation needed; open and eat.
